title: Admin utilities reference a redacted service alias with broad operational scope
impact_summary: Operational helper utilities often concentrate export, replay, and notice-publishing capabilities behind a single service identity.
why_this_matters: A single service key can quietly become the most powerful credential in an internal toolchain.
evidence_fixture: redacted service alias preview used by admin utility demo cards
suggested_patch_summary: Use per-utility scopes, remove inline previews, and keep only aliases in the UI.
verification_summary: Verified as alias-only with no usable key material present.
replay_regression_note: Open the admin utilities panel and compare it with the patch diff that narrows scopes.
